fix_plan.description: Pull latest consumet image and restart the container: docker pull ghcr.io/consumet/api:latest && docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --no-deps consumet
fix_plan.context: The animepahe provider scraper is broken in the current image — updates to animepahe.si's page structure break parsing. Pulling the latest consumet image typically includes scraper fixes. This is the same category of fix as ISS-007 for aniwatch.
fix_plan.verification: After restart, run: curl http://localhost:3101/anime/animepahe/naruto — should return JSON with results array instead of 'Something went wrong'
